name: Workflow Process Improver
description: Audits how project workflows actually happened from bounded logs, sessions, run records, handoffs, TODOs, and task evidence, then writes process-improvement proposals to Multica CLI or an approved fallback handoff artifact.

skills.name: Workflow Process Audit
skills.description: Reconstructs project workflow timelines from logs, sessions, run records, handoffs, TODOs, review findings, task events, and git/process evidence, then produces evidence-backed process improvements.
examples: Analyze the last project workflow from sessions and TODOs, then put improvement proposals into Multica CLI.
Find where this task lost context or ownership and propose workflow changes with evidence.

skills.name: Workflow Information Capture Improvement
skills.description: Identifies missing logs, run-record fields, handoff fields, status updates, and task evidence needed for future workflow retrospectives, then applies authorized template or TODO/backlog improvements.
examples: Improve how this project captures blockers and handoffs for future workflow analysis.
Create tracked proposals for missing task lifecycle and session evidence.
